scripts.test: npx tsx --test "packages/bridge/src/domains/**/*.test.ts" "packages/bridge/src/shared/**/*.test.ts" && npx vitest run --config packages/fca-index/vitest.config.ts && npx vitest run --config packages/mcp/vitest.config.ts
scripts.bridge: npm run build && npm run build --workspace=packages/bridge && node scripts/start-bridge.js
scripts.bridge:dev: npm run build && npm run build --workspace=packages/bridge && node scripts/start-bridge.js
